name: Boiling Springs Ruby C. Hunt YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Boiling Springs Ruby C. Hunt YMCA in Shelby, NC! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Double Shoals Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Double Shoals Baptist Church in Shelby, NC! There is 1 indoor wood court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Elizabeth Baptist Church
description: Elizabeth Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Shelby, NC. There is 1 indoor acrylic court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: J L Suttle Pickleball Complex
description:
This is now pickleball only with 12 dedicated courts. They did have two tennis courts with pickleball lines painted over. 
This complex is owned by Cleveland County Schools and operated by the Pickleball Association of Cleveland County (PACC). Donor names and sponsors are listed.

name: Kings Mountain Family YMCA
description: Kings Mountain Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Kings Mountain, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Shelby City Park Gymnasium
description: Shelby City Park Gymnasium is a place to play pickleball in Shelby, NC. There are 5 acrylic courts. 2 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
